节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Accessibility
The type of the Ability app. { 'audible' | 'generic' | 'haptic' | 'spoken' | 'visual' | 'all' }

The action that the ability can execute. value range: { 'accessibilityFocus' | 'clearAccessibilityFocus' | 'focus' | 'clearFocus' | 'clearSelection' | 'click' | 'longClick' | 'cut' | 'copy' | 'paste' | 'select' | 'setText' | 'delete' | 'scrollForward' | 'scrollBackward' | 'setSelection' | 'setCursorPosition' | 'home' | 'back' | 'recentTask' | 'notificationCenter' | 'controlCenter' | 'common' } 'click' | 'longClick' | 'cut' | 'copy' | 'paste' | 'select' | 'setText' | 'delete' | 'scrollForward' | 'scrollBackward' | 'setSelection' | 'setCursorPosition' | 'home' | 'back' | 'recentTask' | 'notificationCenter' | 'controlCenter' | 'common'}

The type of the accessibility event. windowsChange/windowContentChange/windowStateChange/announcement/notificationChange/textTraversedAtMove value range: { 'accessibilityFocus' | 'accessibilityFocusClear' | 'click' | 'longClick' | 'focus' | 'select' | 'hoverEnter' | 'hoverExit' | 'textUpdate' | 'textSelectionUpdate' | 'scroll' | 'requestFocusForAccessibility' | 'announceForAccessibility' | 'requestFocusForAccessibilityNotInterrupt' | 'announceForAccessibilityNotInterrupt' | 'scrolling' | 'pageActive' } 'focus' | 'select' | 'hoverEnter' | 'hoverExit' | 'textUpdate' | 'textSelectionUpdate' | 'scroll' | 'requestFocusForAccessibility' | 'announceForAccessibility' | 'requestFocusForAccessibilityNotInterrupt' | 'announceForAccessibilityNotInterrupt' | 'scrolling' | 'pageActive'}
The change type of the windowsChange event. It's used when received the {@code windowsChange} event.
The type of the ability state.

The ability that accessibility subsystem support. touchExplorer: Describes the capability to talkback. magnification: Describes the capability to request to control the display magnification. gesturesSimulation: Describes the capability to request to simulate the gesture. windowContent: Describes the capability to search for the content of the active window. filterKeyEvents: Describes the capability to request to filter key events. fingerprintGesture: Describes the capability to request to fingerprint gesture.
The granularity of text move.
Checks whether accessibility ability is enabled.
Checks whether accessibility ability is enabled.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<boolean> } Returns {@code true} if the accessibility is enabled; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the accessibility is enabled; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether accessibility ability is enabled.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the accessibility is enabled; returns false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the accessibility is enabled; returns false otherwise.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the touch browser is enabled; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Queries the list of accessibility abilities.

@param { AbilityState } stateType The state of the accessibility ability.  {@code AbilityState} eg.installed

The state of the accessibility ability.  {@code AbilityState} eg.installed

节点.功能描述: The type of an accessibility event.
The type of the window change event.
The bundle name of the target application.
The type of the event source component,such as button, chart.
The page id of the event source.
The accessibility event description.
The action that triggers the accessibility event, for example, clicking or focusing a view.
The movement step used for reading texts.
The content list.
The content changed before.
The start index of listed items on the screen.
